2195590.name: Cactus Venture
2195590.description:
An old-School platformer about a cactus that merrily jumps on the platforms. Where it goes and where it will end remains to be seen. You have to play as a cute cactus in a classic platform game. A game in the genre of adventure and arcade. The game also has the following:
- Saws
- Spines
- Doors
- Switches and buttons
- Puzzle
- Several different levels
- Gradually more difficult gameplay
Here's what's coming for you
